creator: j@uriah.heep.sax.de
text:
As Neil wrote:

> 	I can get a login prompt on ttyd1 just by changing 'off' to 'on'
> in ttys but using the same cable, terminal, etc I cannot get anything
> when I do exactly the same on ttyd0.

Sorry, but you need to provide us more information.  In general, it
(of course) works, so it must be something special to your
environment.

-- 
cheers, J"org

joerg_wunsch@uriah.heep.sax.de -- http://www.sax.de/~joerg/ -- NIC: JW11-RIPE
Never trust an operating system you don't have sources for. ;-)
